description: Build a quarterly Vendor Performance Scorecard from raw USAID procurement data in /home/ga/Documents/supplier_shipments.xlsx. Create a new sheet named 'Scorecard' with headers for Vendor, Total_Shipments, On_Time_Rate, Avg_Unit_Price, Total_Value, Weighted_Score, and Rank. For the 15 unique vendors identified in the 'Shipments' sheet, calculate their total shipments, on-time rate (on-time shipments divided by total shipments), average unit price, and total line item value. Compute a Weighted_Score for each vendor using the formula: (On_Time_Rate * 0.4) + (1 - Avg_Unit_Price / Max_Avg_Unit_Price) * 0.35 + (Total_Value / Max_Total_Value) * 0.25. Rank the vendors based on this score in descending order and save the updated file to /home/ga/Documents/supplier_shipments.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: USAID Supply Chain Shipment Pricing Data
